testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 200.................................passed And Response should contain a valid authentication token....................passed And Token should not be empty...............................................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "wrongpassword".passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 2
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "invaliduser" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 3
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "" and password "password"....passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 4
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "".......passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 5
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "" and password ""............passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 6
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin' OR '1'='1" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 7
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "' OR '1'='1".passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 8
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "PASSWORD".passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: Access protected resources without valid authentication
testcase.system-out: When User "requests booking report without authentication token"............passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Authentication required"......................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: Verify token expiration time is set correctly
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "password".passed Then API response should contain token expiration time......................passed And Token expiration should be in the future................................passed

testcase.name: User authentication with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 200.................................passed And Response should contain a valid authentication token....................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability for specific dates
testcase.system-out: When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-17" and checkout "2026-07-18".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain available rooms.................................passed And Available rooms list should not be empty................................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability for specific dates 2
testcase.system-out: When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-20" and checkout "2026-07-21".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain available rooms.................................passed And Available rooms list should not be empty................................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability for specific dates 3
testcase.system-out: When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-12-15" and checkout "2026-12-20".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain available rooms.................................passed And Available rooms list should not be empty................................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability for specific dates 4
testcase.system-out: When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-01" and checkout "2026-08-05".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain available rooms.................................passed And Available rooms list should not be empty................................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability for specific dates 5
testcase.system-out: When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-17" and checkout "2026-07-17".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain available rooms.................................passed And Available rooms list should not be empty................................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability with invalid date formats and ranges

failure.message: Response status code mismatch. Expected: 400 Actual: 200 Body: {"rooms":[{"roomid":1,"roomName":"101","type":"Single","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room1.jpg","description":"Aenean porttitor mauris sit amet lacinia molestie. In posuere accumsan aliquet. Maecenas sit amet nisl massa. Interdum et malesuada fames ac ante.","features":["TV","WiFi","Safe"],"roomPrice":100},{"roomid":2,"roomName":"102","type":"Double","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room2.jpg","description":"Vestibulum sollicitudin, lectus ac mollis consequat, lorem orci ultrices tellus, eleifend euismod tortor dui egestas erat. Phasellus et ipsum nisl. ","features":["TV","Radio","Safe"],"roomPrice":150},{"roomid":3,"roomName":"103","type":"Suite","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room3.jpg","description":"Etiam metus metus, fringilla ac sagittis id, consequat vel neque. Nunc commodo quis nisl nec posuere. Etiam at accumsan ex. ","features":["Radio","WiFi","Safe"],"roomPrice":225}]} expected [400] but found [200]

testcase.failure:
When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2025-07-25" and checkout "2025-07-20".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 400...........................failed

testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 200.................................passed And Response should contain a valid authentication token....................passed

testcase.name: Get list of all available rooms
testcase.system-out: When User requests to get list of all rooms.................................passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain list of rooms...................................passed And Each room should have room details......................................passed

testcase.name: Get room details by room ID
testcase.system-out: When User requests to get room details for roomid "1".......................passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain room information................................passed And Room details should contain "roomid"....................................passed

testcase.name: Get room details with invalid room ID

failure.message: Response status code mismatch. Expected: 503 Actual: 500 Body: {"timestamp":"2026-03-30T02:24:27.527+00:00","status":500,"error":"Internal Server Error","path":"/room/99999"} expected [503] but found [500]

testcase.failure:

testcase.system-out: When User requests to get room details for roomid "1".......................passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain room information................................passed And Room details should conform to the room schema..........................passed

testcase.name: Validate room details response structure against schema 2
testcase.system-out: When User requests to get room details for roomid "2".......................passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain room information................................passed And Room details should conform to the room schema..........................passed

testcase.name: User authentication with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 200.................................passed And Response should contain a valid authentication token....................passed

testcase.name: Create a booking with valid details
testcase.system-out: When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-07-17" and checkout "2025-07-18".passed And User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking:.passed Then API response status code should be 201 for booking creation............passed And User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed.....passed And Booking should contain all submitted details............................passed

testcase.name: Create a booking with valid details 2
testcase.system-out: When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-08-01" and checkout "2025-08-05".passed And User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking:.passed Then API response status code should be 201 for booking creation............passed And User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed.....passed And Booking should contain all submitted details............................passed

testcase.name: Attempt to create a booking with missing/invalid required fields
testcase.system-out: When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-08-01" and checkout "2025-08-05".passed And User attempts to create a new booking with missing required fields:.....passed Then API response status code should be 400 for bad request.................passed And User gets "Firstname should not be blank" error message for missing or invalid input fields.passed

testcase.name: Attempt to create a booking with missing/invalid required fields 2
testcase.system-out: When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-08-01" and checkout "2025-08-05".passed And User attempts to create a new booking with missing required fields:.....passed Then API response status code should be 400 for bad request.................passed And User gets "Lastname should not be blank" error message for missing or invalid input fields.passed

testcase.name: Attempt to create a booking with missing/invalid required fields 3

failure.message: Expected status code 400 for bad request, but got: 201 Body: {"bookingid":7,"roomid":2122,"firstname":"John","lastname":"Doe","depositpaid":false,"bookingdates":{"checkin":"2025-08-01","checkout":"2025-08-05"}} expected [400] but found [201]

testcase.failure:
When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-08-01" and checkout "2025-08-05".passed And User attempts to create a new booking with missing required fields:.....passed Then API response status code should be 400 for bad request.................failed And User gets "must be a well-formed email address" error message for missing or invalid input fields.skipped
StackTrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected status code 400 for bad request, but got: 201 Body: {"bookingid":7,"roomid":2122,"firstname":"John","lastname":"Doe","depositpaid":false,"bookingdates":{"checkin":"2025-08-01","checkout":"2025-08-05"}} expected [400] but found [201] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:99) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1037) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:140) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:122) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:907) at com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_status_code_should_be_for_bad_request(E2EHotelBooking.java:437) at ✽.API response status code should be 400 for bad request(file:///D:/Joshiba/Kata_Cucumber_Project/api_hotel_booking/src/test/resources/features/04_createBooking.feature:58)

testcase.name: Attempt to create a booking with missing/invalid required fields 4

failure.message: Expected status code 400 for bad request, but got: 201 Body: {"bookingid":8,"roomid":2396,"firstname":"John","lastname":"Doe","depositpaid":false,"bookingdates":{"checkin":"2025-08-01","checkout":"2025-08-05"}} expected [400] but found [201]

testcase.failure:
When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-08-01" and checkout "2025-08-05".passed And User attempts to create a new booking with missing required fields:.....passed Then API response status code should be 400 for bad request.................failed And User gets "must not be empty" error message for missing or invalid input fields.skipped

testcase.name: Attempt to create a booking with missing/invalid required fields 5
testcase.system-out: When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-08-01" and checkout "2025-08-05".passed And User attempts to create a new booking with missing required fields:.....passed Then API response status code should be 400 for bad request.................passed And User gets "size must be between 11 and 21" error message for missing or invalid input fields.passed

testcase.name: Attempt to create a booking with missing/invalid required fields 6
testcase.system-out: When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-08-01" and checkout "2025-08-05".passed And User attempts to create a new booking with missing required fields:.....passed Then API response status code should be 400 for bad request.................passed And User gets "must be a well-formed email address" error message for missing or invalid input fields.passed

testcase.classname: Update Booking Details - Shady Meadows B&B
testcase.name: Complete happy path - Create, Update, and Verify Booking Details
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user credentials:................................passed And User stores the authentication token....................................passed Then API response status code for E2E should be 200.........................passed When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-12-12" and checkout "2025-12-13".passed And User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking:.passed Then API response status code should be 201 for booking creation............passed And User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed.....passed When User attempts to update booking ID with following details:.............passed Then Booking update should be successful with status 200....................passed And Updated booking details should be reflected in system...................passed When User retrieves booking details using stored booking ID via API.........passed Then API response should contain updated booking details with status code 200.passed

testcase.name: Complete happy path - Create, Book, and Receive Confirmation
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user credentials:................................passed And User stores the authentication token....................................passed Then API response status code for E2E should be 200.........................passed When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-12-19" and checkout "2025-12-21".passed And User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking:.passed Then API response status code should be 201 for booking creation............passed And User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed.....passed When User retrieves booking details using stored booking ID via API.........passed Then API response should contain booking details with status code 200.......passed When User attempts to cancel booking with ID via API........................passed Then Booking cancellation should be successful with status 200..............passed And API response should return 404 when retrieving cancelled booking details.passed

testcase.name: Attempt to cancel a non-existent booking
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user credentials:................................passed And User stores the authentication token....................................passed Then API response status code for E2E should be 200.........................passed When User attempts to cancel booking with non-existent ID "9999" via API....passed Then Response should indicate an error message "Failed to delete booking"...passed

testcase.name: Get booking report for a specific date range
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 200.................................passed And Response should contain a valid authentication token....................passed When User requests to get booking report for data available.................passed Then API response status code of BR should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain booking report data.............................passed And Each booking in the report should have valid details....................passed
